title: chionanthus bakeri
intro: Chionanthus bakeri, also known as the White Chrysanthemum Tree or Chinese Fringe Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Oleaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chionanthus bakeri include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in digestion. Chionanthus bakeri can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
